name: floreat
description: Floreat — structural quotation studio (npm workspaces monorepo).

scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build --workspace frontend && npm run build --workspace backend
scripts.dev:backend: npm run build:shared && npm run dev --workspace backend
scripts.docs:generate: npm run build:shared && npm run docs:generate --workspace backend
scripts.docs:check: npm run build:shared && npm run docs:check --workspace backend
scripts.dev:frontend: npm run build:shared && npm run dev --workspace frontend
